member.comment: email Jill.Hunter-Williams@mail.house.gov and William.Miles@mail.house.gov. IN THE SUBJECT LINE, please specify "FY27 PROGRAM REQUEST - [topic]" or "FY27 LANGUAGE REQUEST - [topic]" to help us identify your request correctly. Please include in the email as much detail about your request as possible including if there is a group letter supporting the request, whether the request is for report language or programmatic funding, the specific account/program associated with the request, the subcommittee of jurisdiction, and a short description of why the request is important.
member.office_address: 2159 Rayburn House Office Building Washington DC 20515-1307

top_contracts.description: This bpa call provides the vehicle for funding for fy25 employee relocation services for all NASA installations under NASA bpa 80nssc23aa021.
top_contracts.generated_award_summary: Funding essential personnel relocation services across NASA centers.

top_contracts.description: This bpa call provides the vehicle for funding fy24 employee relocation services for all NASA installations under NASA bpa 80nssc23aa021.
top_contracts.generated_award_summary: Securing logistical support for relocating NASA employees.

top_grants.description: Reproducible containers for advancing process-oriented collaborative analytics
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Advancing reproducible analytics tools for collaborative scientific research

top_grants.description: 21-apra21-0058  development of skipper ccds for robust single-photon measurements in future NASA missions
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Building robust single-photon detectors for upcoming NASA science instruments.

top_grants.description: eo14042 ensuring culturally responsive practices and community building in open science
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Fostering inclusive community practices in open science collaboration.

top_grants.description: This proposal builds on a highly successful nasa-zooniverse partnership and advances a strategic  high-impact effort to scale the integration of citizen science and ai in support of NASA'S science priorities.
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Scaling citizen science and AI integration for NASA research.

top_grants.description: Execute a balanced science program based on discipline-specific guidance from the national academies of sciences  engineering  and medicine  administration priorities  and direction from congress.   Participate as a key partner and enabler in the agency S exploration initiative  focusing on scientific research of  on  and from the moon  lunar orbit  Mars  and beyond.   Advance discovery in emerging fields by identifying and exploiting cross-disciplinary opportunities between traditional science disciplines   develop a directorate-wide  target-user focused approach to applied programs  including Earth science applications  space weather  planetary defense  and space situational awareness.
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Supporting strategic science for Moon, Mars exploration, and planetary defense.

top_grants.description: Using dynamically evolving disk chemistry models to constrain comet formation
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Constraining comet formation via dynamic disk chemistry models.
